statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Recapture Region — 5 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Recapture Region — 定理 5 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1240 — D-FUMT₈ Recapture Region — Axiom-Free Lean 4 Formalization

  Cotnoir 2015 (St Andrews, "Nāgārjuna's Logic" Ch 8 in
  https://www.st-andrews.ac.uk/~ac117/papers/Nagarjuna.pdf) raised the
  *classical recapture problem* for Priest+Garfield-style FDE readings of
  Nāgārjuna: if FDE is the underlying logic, modus ponens fails, yet
  Nāgārjuna freely uses classical inferences elsewhere in the MMK. One
  cannot simply add modus ponens as an assumption because in a background
  paraconsistent logic that does not rule out its negation.

  This file gives a Lean 4 axiom-free resp

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
